knowledge.insight: Yamamoto: The Senko was initially considered a flop because it did not catch fish when applied the way it was originally intended. Over 17 million Senkos were produced in 2016 alone
Book 'Gary Yamamoto: My Life with Fish' by Steve Price contains one-page tips at end of each chapter on fishing the Senko, Hula Grub, dropshot rigs, flipping, and Neko rig
